ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (actor)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(movie2:Movie {released: 1976}),
    p3 = (actor)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(reviewedMovie:Movie {tagline: 'You talkin' to me?'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What impact did Martin Scorsese’s 1976 directorial debut have on the thematic tone of *Taxi Driver*, and how did his own review of the film reflect his personal critique of societal isolation?

cypher: MATCH (scorsese:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(debut:Movie {released: 1976}),       (scorsese)-[:REVIEWED]->(taxiDriver:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"})\nRETURN scorsese.name AS director, debut.title AS debutMovie, taxiDriver.title AS targetMovie,       scorsese.name + " on " + debutMovie + " and " + taxiDriver + " themes" AS thematicImpact,       scorsese.name + " review of " + taxiDriver AS reviewReflection
